description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of two jobs: ruff and test. The ruff job lints the code using ruff on an ubuntu-latest environment. The test job runs tests in a matrix of Django versions, Python versions, and a single Elasticsearch version, requiring the ruff job to succeed. The test job sets up a Python environment, installs system dependencies, sets up a Solr test server, installs project dependencies, and runs tests using tox.
